recommendations.overview: A group of astronauts living in the haunting emptiness of deep space struggle to cope after Earth suffers an extinction-level event.

recommendations.title: Red Planet
recommendations.overview: Astronauts search for solutions to save a dying Earth by searching on Mars, only to have the mission go terribly awry.

recommendations.title: The Beyond
recommendations.overview: Set in 2019, The Beyond chronicles the groundbreaking mission which sent astronauts - modified with advanced robotics, through a newly discovered wormhole known as the Void. When the mission returns unexpectedly, the space agency races to discover wh

recommendations.title: The Vast of Night
recommendations.overview: At the dawn of the space-race, two radio-obsessed teens discover a strange frequency over the airwaves in what becomes the most important night of their lives and in the history of their small town.

recommendations.title: Hubble
recommendations.overview: An IMAX 3D camera chronicles the effort of 7 astronauts aboard the Space Shuttle Atlantis to repair the Hubble Space Telescope.

recommendations.title: The Right Stuff
recommendations.overview: At the dawn of the Space Race, seven test pilots set out to become the first American astronauts to enter space. However, the road to making history brings momentous challenges.

recommendations.title: Ikarie XB 1
recommendations.overview: The year is 2163. Starship Ikaria XB 1 embarks on a mission deep into space in search of alien life.  During their perilous journey the crew confront the effects of a malignant dark star, the destructive legacy of the 20th century and, ultimately, th

recommendations.title: Botched
recommendations.overview: Ritchie Donovan is a professional thief whose luck has just run out. The only survivor from a heist that goes terribly wrong, Ritchie is forced to take the rap and is sent to Russia to steal a priceless antique cross locked in a safe on the penthouse

recommendations.title: The Immaculate Room
recommendations.overview: Mike and Kate, a young couple, get the once-in-a lifetime chance to win a cool five million dollars. The challenge: Live for 50 days in a blank space. Sticking it out for thirty days, and the five million are theirs. How difficult can it be?

recommendations.title: Alien: Romulus
recommendations.overview: While scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station, a group of young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe.
